svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(247, 250, 252), rgb(20, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 196, 208), rgb(62, 72, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 484px; height: 1px; padding-top: 21px; margin-left: 16px;
